response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience spanning frontend, backend, mobile, and infrastructure. He has direct, recent experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Kubernetes) and — notably rare — hands-on AI agent development including MCP tooling at re:cinq. Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing libraries he authored) aligns well with the code-quality and testing expectations. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, significant frontend time in Ember rather than React, and a current career gap since October 2025 worth clarifying in an interview.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work
Direct AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
Deep testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, and Kotlin is absent from the skill set
Much frontend history is Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one role
Current career gap since October 2025 and a short 6-month tenure at the most recent employer

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js/Kotlin and recent career gap
